PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Irene Ly, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with Ms. Ly of the commitment required to serve as Administrator, if appointed, including, but not limited to, all responsibilities listed in the Duties and Liabilities. Ms. Ly then confirms that the amount of personal property is currently in stocks and bank accounts. The court then confirms with Ms. Ly that currently the plan is to keep the real property. The court advises Ms. Ly that if the court grants her petition, she will likely be appointed with limited authority and with a $20,000 bond. The court then confirms that Ms. Ly will be able to obtain a bond in that amount.

After additional discussion, including status dates which will be included in the court's order, the Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
